content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is under pressure with Nifty -1.36%, Nifty IT cratering -5.33%, VIX +5.8% to 19.67. Global cues weak (US indices red). Defensive sectors (FMCG, Pharma) holding up relatively, PSU banks weak. Book already 68% deployed with net negative unrealized P&L; deployment hysteresis applies — default disposition is capital preservation and managing existing book, not chasing new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Held at -5.7%, CMP 76.94 vs SL 74.50. Thesis intact: Q4 27% PAT beat, GNPA 1.45%, PSU bank cohort leader. CMP above VWAP 76.59 and above key support 76.95 zone. SL gives ~3% more room which is appropriate. No trail possible since position is underwater. Hold through SL, exit if 74.50 breaks."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1011.65,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +4.8% — trailing SL mandate triggered (≥+4% unrealized). Current SL already at 1011.65 which is above entry 984, so breakeven+ locked. Checking trail formula: max(984, 1031.55×0.98=1010.92) = 1010.92. Current SL 1011.65 already satisfies trail — no MODIFY needed. Emitting HOLD equivalent."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Marginally down -0.9%. Defensive hedge given VIX +5.8%. SL 119 is ~4% below CMP — appropriate for ETF volatility. No change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position nearly flat (+0.4%). Q4 blowout (PAT +27%, rev +23%, EBITDA margin 26.3%), defensive FMCG holding up on a red tape. Stock printed 52w high today. Tightening SL marginally from 1400 to 1405 to better protect capital since CMP is 1418 with support at 1409 intraday. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4% but hit 1079 intraday before pulling back. 52-week high nearby. April 27 board meeting is binary event risk in 3 days. Tightening SL from 1045 to 1048 (just below entry 1049.05) to protect capital into earnings. Small tightening locks breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Marginal +0.4%, SL 672 is ~1.7% below CMP — tight but appropriate. Q4 results April 29 is binary event. Current SL well-placed. Not trailing further since position is barely above entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.8%, CMP 2304 vs SL 2260 (~2% room left). Q4 results April 30 is binary event risk. Stock gave back gains after ramping to 2380 intraday. Thesis (rural recovery read-through) intact; SL placement is appropriate. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1%, SL 393 (~1.8% below CMP). Power sector defensive with Q4 results May 15. Current SL appropriate — no action needed."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Underwater position; SL 74.50 intact. Wait for either support hold and recovery or stop-out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1011.65 (well above entry 984) — trail condition satisfied. No further tightening yet; give the position room toward 1100 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; marginal loss, no adjustment."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 1400 to 1405 after Q4 print and 52w high; lock in close to breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "reasoning": "Protect breakeven into April 27 board meeting binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL already in place; let it ride into April 29 earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2260 intact; thesis not broken, holding into April 30 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 393 appropriate; wait for sector momentum or stop-out."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GLENMARK — at 52w high but reversing intraday (-1%), wait for clean pullback to ~2250 support. OFSS — blowout Q4 but up 10% already, too extended to chase. CLEAN — weak fundamentals despite volume surge, avoid. HUDCO — divergent strength but 6M/12M laggard, needs sustained breakout. DRREDDY — wait for direction post analyst downgrade digestion.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed in a CAUTIOUS market with VIX rising, IT crashing, and negative total P&L today. Per deployment hysteresis rule, default is NO new entries. Focus is protecting existing positions, most of which face binary earnings events in the next 3-7 days (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, NTPC May 15). Have concentration risk in Financials (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK ≈ 36% of capital — at sector cap limit). No new financials additions. Continue monitoring MAHABANK closely — largest unrealized loss."
}
